title: Senior Frontend Developer
description:
We are looking for a passionate Senior PHP Developer to be part of our development team.
 
Responsibilities



Analyze and resolve technical and application problems
Deploy new releases that work
Participate in the design and development phase of software production
Perform code reviews to drive teams to the highest standards for backend development
Provides communication with the Product Manager, teammates and dependent teams in order to write efficient code


Qualifications



BS degree in Software/Computer Engineering or significant relevant experience.
4+ years of experience in software development 
Familiar with designing REST APIs considering best practices including postman, throttling and log management
Experience of writing/integrating an API system
Experience with modern server components (Redis,Docker)
Working with Git version control system, including branching and merging strategies
Understanding of HTML, CSS, Javascript, React and other web technologies
Solid understanding of OOP concepts and software design patterns.
Passionate about testing and clean code
Great team player
No military obligation for male candidates.


Personal Specification/Skills



Ability to work independently with minimal supervision
Team worker, problem solver and decision maker
Strong communication and analytical thinking skills
Openness to feedback
Good in interpersonal relations
A passion to learn and keep up with the cutting edge technologies
A maker/builder mentality
Being obsessively detail oriented
